entry.title: Navigating Saudi Arabia’s Data Protection Framework: Part 3 – Data Residency
entry.content:
Welcome to part 3 of the blog series Navigating Saudi Arabia’s Data Protection Framework. In this part we will focus on the Data residency.

Data residency regulations ensure that personal data, even when transferred outside Saudi Arabia, continues to receive the highest level of protection. These regulations are aligned with the overarching goal of safeguarding the personal information of Saudi citizens and residents, wherever that data may reside.

 

Key Requirements Summary for Data Residency

Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) and the National Data Management and Personal Data Protection Standards place strict regulations on how personal data is handled, particularly when it comes to transferring data outside the Kingdom. The key provisions include:

  • Purpose and Necessity: Data can only be transferred or disclosed outside Saudi Arabia if it aligns with the specific purposes allowed by law, such as fulfilling agreements to which the Kingdom is a party, serving the public interest, or meeting national security objectives.
  • Minimum Necessary Transfer: Controllers must limit the transfer or disclosure of personal data to the minimum necessary and ensure that such transfers do not compromise data privacy or security.
  • Adequate Protection Measures: The level of protection in the destination country must meet or exceed Saudi Arabia's standards for data privacy, including the rights of data subjects, breach notifications, and data security.
  • Risk Assessments: Controllers are required to conduct risk assessments for data transfers outside the Kingdom, ensuring that the process is compliant with PDPL and does not introduce undue risks to data subjects.
  • Exceptions: While there are allowances for transferring data outside KSA, these are strictly regulated. Exceptions include situations where the transfer is necessary to fulfill contractual obligations, safeguard the Kingdom's vital interests, or comply with public sector requirements.

 

CCC2020 Regulations and Compliance

Public sector entities and Critical National Infrastructure (CNI) organizations, such as ARAMCO and SABIC, must adhere to the Cloud Cybersecurity Controls (CCC 2020) issued by the National Cybersecurity Authority (NCA). These regulations mandate strict data residency requirements, ensuring that data related to public sector and CNI entities remains within KSA borders. Organizations in this category must host their data in local data centers, and cloud services must be provided from within KSA.

Exemptions under the PDPL do not apply to these organizations, given their sensitive nature and the critical importance of maintaining national security and infrastructure integrity.

 

SAP’s Data Residency Compliance Plan

As part of its commitment to comply with CCC2020 regulations and ensure its customers in Saudi Arabia meet the necessary legal requirements, SAP has launched a KSA Migration Project:

  • Migration to Google Cloud Platform (GCP):
    • SAP is migrating customers to the new Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Data Center in Dammam. This data center is certified under CCC2020 regulations and provides a local, secure environment for storing and processing sensitive data.
  • Two-Phase Migration Timeline:
    • The first phase focus on migrating customers subject to CCC2020 regulations, particularly public sector and CNI organizations.
    • The second phase covers the remaining customers who are not bound by CCC2020 but still require secure local data hosting to meet PDPL compliance.
  • Enhanced Security and Compliance Features:
    • Moving SAP applications to GCP ensures the latest in cloud technology, with S/4HANA Private Cloud becoming available for Saudi customers. The migration will provide secure, state-of-the-art infrastructure compliant with both CCC2020 and PDPL.

By aligning with national regulatory frameworks and enhancing local data processing capabilities, SAP is supporting its customers in achieving compliance while leveraging cutting-edge technology.

 

Conclusion: Navigating Compliance with SAP Solutions

As Saudi Arabia strengthens its data governance through the National Data Management and Personal Data Protection Standards, PDPL, and Data Residency requirements, compliance is critical. SAP provides comprehensive solutions, including Governance Risk and Compliance (GRC) tools, SuccessFactors, S/4HANA, and Business Technology Platform (BTP), to meet these regulations effectively. These platforms offer features like Data Protection & Privacy (DPP) capabilities and other features such as breach management, consent tracking, and data retention controls.

With SAP’s integrated approach, organizations are empowered to ensure full compliance, protect personal data, and manage critical data activities while building trust and ensuring operational continuity ahead of the September 2024 deadline.

Disclaimer: 

The content of this blog is based on personal interpretation of the regulations and SAP solutions. It is provided for guidance and informational purposes only. For specific details about SAP products and their implementation, please consult with an SAP solution advisor or product expert.

entry.title: HCM Brasil - eSocial S-1.3 - Entrega do evento S-1210 - Pagamentos de Rendimentos do Trabalho
entry.content:
Olá pessoal, 

Na última sexta-feira, 04 de outubro, concluímos a segunda etapa das nossas entregas relacionadas ao eSocial S-1.3. 

Nesta fase, nos dedicamos em realizar todas as modificações relacionadas ao evento S-1210 - Pagamentos de Rendimentos do Trabalho, proporcionando aos nossos clientes e parceiros um período maior para testes e adaptação à nova versão do evento. 

Esta mudança permite a retificação das informações do grupo {infoIRComplem} enviadas no ano anterior, em janeiro do próximo ano, sem a obrigatoriedade de reabrir os períodos anteriores (evento S-1298). Este processo é considerado pelo governo como uma retificação da DIRF.  

A recomendação do governo é que esta funcionalidade seja utilizada de forma extraordinária, somente quando as mudanças da informação do grupo {infoIRComplem} não impactar os valores transitados na folha de pagamento. O governo irá considerar como retificação da DIRF o uso do grupo {infoIRComplem/perAnt}.

Na imagem acima, os blocos em azul representam os eventos S-1210 referentes ao ano de 2025 e o bloco laranja representa o evento S-1210 de janeiro de 2026 

Nesta entrega, as seguintes SAP Notes foram liberadas: 

  • 3511711 - eSocial - New subtype in 0035 infotype to indicate rectification periods from S-1210 event.  
  • 3509400 - Prerequisite transformation object for SAP Note 3509401.  
  • 3509401 - eSocial S-1.3 - S-1210 - Conversion class. 
  • 3515907 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3515949.  
  • 3515949 - eSocial S-1.3 - S-1210 - New feature and table view. 
  • 3521569 - eSocial S-1.3 NT 01/2024 - S-1210 - Update Transformation. 
  • 3514497 - eSocial S-1.3 - S-1210 Labor income payments. 

IMPORTANTE: 
É de extrema importância que, no período de apuração janeiro de 2025, impreterivelmente, o envio do evento S-1210 seja realizado na versão S-1.3 do eSocial. Isso garantirá que todos os eventos de 2025 estejam de acordo com versão do eSocial S-1.3 ou superior, possibilitando o uso do evento S-1210 como substituto da DIRF em 2026. 

Atualização do planejamento 

Conforme divulgado neste blogpost, a SAP planeja entregar essa alteração legal em 3 etapas: 

  1. Etapa 1 em 30 de agosto de 2024: Eventos com escopo limitado (são aqueles que dependem exclusivamente de implementação de clientes e parceiros). 
  2. Etapa 2 em 04 de outubro de 2024: Alterações relacionadas ao evento S-1210 - Pagamentos de Rendimentos do Trabalho.
  3. Etapa 3 em 01 de novembro de 2024: Alterações dos demais eventos cobertos pela solução standard.

Mais informações 

Você encontra maiores informações sobre esse planejamento acessando o Regulatory Change Manager. 

Lembrando que todas as entregas referentes ao eSocial você consegue encontrar na SAP Note 3418378 - eSocial - Overview - 2024. 

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas. 

Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este Blog post no espaço abaixo. E não esqueçam de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para ficarem ligados nas últimas notícias. 

Um abraço, 

Ramiro Manoel

entry.title: Who Will Win? Witness the Ultimate Partner Innovation Showdown at SuccessConnect
entry.content:
We’re thrilled to announce a brand-new experience at SuccessConnect in Lisbon, Portugal, this year: the Partner Innovation Showdown! This live event brings together top SAP SuccessFactors partners to present their latest innovations in a friendly competition, with the chance for attendees to get involved, vote, and crown a winner. If you’re ready to be inspired by the cutting-edge solutions that are reshaping HR, this session is a must-see.

Connect, Engage, and Be Inspired

Taking place on Tuesday, October 29th, from 1:00 – 2:00 PM on the Show Floor in Theater 1, the Partner Innovation Showdown will be an exiting contest where innovation comes alive. With the venue located right next to the Partner Innovation Demo Pod and lunch area, you can easily grab a bite to eat and then settle in for an hour of groundbreaking ideas.

Five outstanding partners – Grayscale, Sodales, Beamery, TalenTeam, and Degreed – will each take the stage for a seven-minute pitch, followed by a brief Q&A. Attendees, including SAP judges and customers, will have the chance to vote live using Mentimeter, making this a truly interactive experience. By the end, we’ll reveal the most innovative solution and celebrate a winner!

Why Attend?

  • Witness Top Solutions: The Showdown will highlight real-world use cases that demonstrate the latest advancements in the SAP SuccessFactors suite of solutions.
  • Interact and Influence: As part of the audience, you’ll play an active role in determining which solution stands out, gaining insights and helping select the winner.
  • Get Inspired by Partner Innovation: Our SAP SuccessFactors Partner Ecosystem is a hub of ingenuity. See firsthand how these innovations can empower your business and inspire you to take your own HR strategy to the next level.

Add the Partner Innovation Showdown to your agenda builder today, and get ready to engage with the future of HR innovation at SuccessConnect. Don’t miss out on this exciting opportunity to see our partners in action!

entry.title: Seeking Support to Achieve My Dream: SAP HCM Associate Certificate
entry.content:
As an aspiring SAP HCM professional, I am on a journey to deepen my skills and knowledge in the world of SAP. Over the past year, I have transitioned from an SAP ABAP developer role into an SAP HCM consultant position. This shift has allowed me to explore the intricate workings of Human Capital Management and develop hands-on experience with SAP's comprehensive solutions.

In my current role, I have gained valuable experience in understanding the complexities of SAP HCM, such as personnel administration, organizational management, and time management. However, to further my professional growth and truly solidify my foundation, I am keen on earning the SAP HCM Associate Certification. Achieving this certification would not only validate my skills but also open new opportunities for career advancement and allow me to contribute more effectively to my organization.

Unfortunately, due to financial constraints, I am unable to afford the cost of the certification. I am reaching out to the SAP community and certification bodies to seek support for obtaining this valuable credential. I believe that with a certification, I can maximize my potential and continue contributing to SAP HCM projects with confidence and expertise.

Why Am I a Worthy Candidate?

  • Passion for SAP HCM: I am passionate about leveraging SAP technology to optimize HR processes and improve organizational efficiency. I consistently invest time in self-learning through available online resources, webinars, and hands-on practice.

  • Practical Experience: With my background as an SAP ABAP developer and my current role as an SAP HCM consultant, I have acquired a blend of technical and functional skills. This combination enables me to approach SAP HCM problems with a holistic perspective, bridging the gap between technical development and business requirements.

  • Commitment to Professional Growth: Despite financial challenges, I remain dedicated to advancing my career and skill set. The SAP HCM certification would serve as a catalyst for my professional development and would enable me to deliver better outcomes for clients and projects.

How Can SAP and the Community Support Me?

I am requesting assistance in the form of a scholarship or sponsorship to cover the certification cost. By investing in me, SAP or any supporting organization would not only be helping an individual achieve their goals but also contributing to the growth of the SAP community by enabling a committed professional to flourish.

Thank you for taking the time to read my story. I remain hopeful that I will find a way to achieve this certification and continue my journey as an SAP HCM consultant. Your support would be greatly appreciated, and I promise to pay it forward by helping others in similar situations once I am in a position to do so.

Sincerely,
Yeswanthraj Krishnan.

entry.title: SuccessConnect 2024-Every employee is a success story with SAP BTP
entry.content:
SAP Business Technology Platform at SuccessConnect 2024

Exciting news, demos and information on innovation, integration, extending HR apps, AI, analytics and workforce planning

It’s time to get ready for this year’s SAP SuccessFactors SuccessConnect event!  This year’s sold-out event takes place in Lisbon, Portugal October 28 through the 30th and features more SAP Business Technology Platform-related sessions than ever before – 18 sessions including one special session on workforce planning available for free in the virtual event!

Discover solutions designed to fuel employee and business success and strategies for improving your employee experiences, decisions, and processes.

To help guide attendees in packing their agendas with as much SAP BTP content and information as possible, here’s a guide of what is happening. Add these sessions to your SuccessConnect agenda now!

For more information on this year’s SuccessConnect event, visit https://www.sap.com/events/successconnect.html or to learn more about how SAP Business Technology Platform can help HR visit http://www.sap.com/btp-for-hr .

General and Business Technology Platform

  • Using SAP Integration Suite to connect HR with the business
    Learn how SAP Integration Suite can help you connect HR across the business by integrating SAP SuccessFactors HCM with other SAP and third-party applications. Hear how organizations of all sizes are using this approach to create a single source of people data, enable end-to-end processes, and drive automation and efficiency. SAP Integration Suite 

  • Using SAP Build to extend your SAP SuccessFactors solutions
    Standardized business processes have come a long way, but every company still has a few things it does differently from everybody else. SAP Build solutions can help extend your human capital management solutions to address your specific business needs. See firsthand how to create low-code/no-code apps that boost end-user adoption and efficiency. SAP Build 

  • Road map and vision: Technology Foundation
    Explore the latest innovations and enhancements in the technology foundation of SAP SuccessFactors solutions, including workforce analytics, security, integration, extensibility, and more. Gain insights into what we have planned for our upcoming releases and get your questions answered by our product experts.

  • See how new innovations help you integrate and extend your SAP SuccessFactors solutions
    Discover how our recent innovations around domain-driven APIs and push events can help transform your business operations and enhance the user experience. Learn how you can use these technologies to achieve near real-time integrations with external service providers and streamline your business processes

  • Build trust with security and identity management technologies
    Discover the key technologies and innovations to help you secure your people data. Explore key challenges and learn how to mitigate risk and develop trust with a deep dive into newly available capabilities, including customer-managed keys in the new advanced encryption add-on and enhancements to the role-based permissions tool.

  • Unlock innovation with the generative AI hub
    The new generative AI hub in SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad makes it easier for developers to build applications securely and efficiently with access to a broad range of tools and large language models. See how tools for prompt engineering, experimentation, and other AI capabilities can accelerate your development of applications for HR and more.

 

Analytics and Workforce Planning

  • Hands-on-lab: Create compelling report stories in SAP SuccessFactors HCM
    Designed for reporting administrators, this session will help you learn how to use a single, unified reporting approach to tell compelling stories. Get hands-on experience with key capabilities, such as rich visualizations and intelligent data joins, and learn how to use live data from SAP SuccessFactors solutions. This session is intended for intermediate to advanced reporting administrators with a working knowledge of the report center and role-based security permissions. It is for existing customers only. Laptops and scripts will be supplied. Note that registration is required for this session. Space is limited so that speakers have time to answer attendee questions. If a registered session attendee is five minutes late to the session, we will give their seat to the next person waiting in line. SAP Analytics Cloud 

  • Road map and vision: Reporting and analytics
    Explore the latest innovations in analytics and the significant benefits they offer for your business. Discover how to make use of these enhancements by finding out more about our new SAP SuccessFactors Analytics solution, report stories within SAP SuccessFactors solutions, and workforce planning in SAP Analytics Cloud for planning. SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning 

  • Improving people sustainability with workforce planning and data analytics
    With skill gaps increasing and regulatory mandates growing more complex, CHROs are turning to longer-term people sustainability. Discover how HR leaders can use AI-driven analytics and strategic workforce planning to create a workforce of the future. Gain insights on using skills analysis to inform talent investments and improve workforce planning. SAP Analytics Cloud 

  • Get the mot out of workforce planning templates using SAP Analytics Cloud for planning
    SAP Analytics Cloud for planning includes workforce planning templates. Get an overview of the various templates available in the business content network and the planning processes they support. Whether you’re looking to do operational, strategic, or skill-based workforce planning, these insights can help you. SAP Analytics Cloud for planning 

  • Top three ways to create dynamic operational report stories
    How do you best create stories as unfolding narratives for your users to further explore data in more detail? Gain practical tips on how to use report stories within SAP SuccessFactors solutions to create dynamic, interactive stories that let users dive into details as needed. SAP Analytics Cloud 

 

Customer Speaking Sessions

  • How Eurobank uses SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking and SAP BTP to comply with local labor legislation
    To maintain compliance with a new labor law and avoid costly fines, Eurobank chose the SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking solution and SAP Business Technology Platform. Learn how the financial organization accurately tracks employee work hours, shifts, and overtime while linking data in real time to third-party platforms.

  • Unleashing HR insights: Reporting and workforce analytics at Dr. Oetker
    See how reporting in SAP SuccessFactors solutions has transformed Dr. Oetker’s HR reporting landscape and explore real-world use cases in the SAP SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics solution. From overcoming challenges to unlocking transformative insights, discover the power of reporting and analytics capabilities of SAP solutions. SAP Analytics Cloud 

  • How agile HR transformation at Volkswagen increased performance and transparency
    Using the “SAFe” framework, Volkswagen implemented SAP SuccessFactors solutions in one of the largest HR transformation programs worldwide. Join this session to learn how the company established a new product organization to increase performance and transparency.

Demo stations

  • DP106: HR analytics and workforce planning area
    Discover how you can improve company performance and decision-making with data-driven people insights, workforce planning tools, and AI-driven recommendations. SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP Analytics Cloud for planning 

  • DP105: System administration and extensibility area
    See how SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) can help you grow your capabilities with third-party integrations and custom extensions featuring a real-world demo of a re-envisioning automated equipment ordering with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central driving real-time triggers to order new hire equipment in SAP Ariba via SAP Integration Suite with automated service ticket create in SAP Service Cloud. SAP Integration Suite  SAP Build

entry.title: コンパチビリティ・パックの使用権終了にともなうHCM機能への影響と対応方法（H4S4_1の有効化）
entry.content:
※このブログはSAP公式ブログやノートを参考和訳としてまとめたものであり、英語のオリジナル資料、公式文章との差異がある場合は英語版を優先いたします。

2025年12月31日で、S/4HANAのコンパチビリティ・パック（Compatibility Pack、互換性パック）に該当する機能の使用権が終了します。S/4HANAの中でHCMの機能（従業員マスタ含む）をご利用中のお客様は、このコンパチビリティ・パックの使用権終了に伴い、ご利用中の機能に影響がある可能性があります。

コンパチビリティ・パックの使用権終了については以下のブログをご参照ください。

参考：Compatibility Scope: What Happens after 2025/2030　（英語）

 

対象となるお客様

S/4HANAオンプレミス、またはS/4HANA cloud, private edition(PCE)でHCM機能（※）をご利用中、あるいはご利用予定のお客様で、以下のいずれかの条件に該当するお客様。

  • SAP HCM for S/4HANAのライセンスをご契約でないお客様
  • オンプレミス、あるいはPCEにてSAP HCM for S/4HANAのライセンスをご契約済みだが、H4S4_1のビジネスファンクションスイッチを有効化されていないお客様

 

※ここでいうHCM機能とは、人事管理、組織管理、給与管理、勤怠管理、研修管理、採用管理等を指します。コンパチビリティ・パック対象となる人事機能の詳細については以下の文書やヘルプをご参照ください。

Compatibility Pack Scope Matrix for SAP S/4HANA

SAP S/4HANA 2023 Feature Scope Description　のChapter5（HCMについてはP.688以降に記載があります）

また、ミニマスタのみのご利用（会計や販売などのほかのモジュールでHCMの一部のインフォタイプのみご利用）の場合、コンパチビリティ・パックに該当しません。ミニマスタについては以下のSAP Noteをご参照ください。

3369920 - SAP S/4HANA without HCM - use of HR mini-master (subset of HCM infotypes)

ご利用範囲がコンパチビリティ・パックに該当するかどうか判断するために、お客様ご自身でReadiness Checkを実行することができます。詳細については対応方法の1)をご確認ください。

 

前提条件

S/4HANA2022以上

（オンプレミス、PCE問わず、S/4HANA2021以下のバージョンでHCM機能をご利用のお客様は、早急に担当のSAP営業、あるいは導入・保守パートナーにお知らせください。）

 

対応方法

1) まずはご利用中のS/4HANA環境でコンパチビリティ・パックの対象の機能を使っているかどうか、また、シンプル化（Simplification）の対象になっている機能を使っているかどうか確認するために、SAP Readiness Check for S/4HANAまたはEarly Watch Alert（EWA）を実行してください。すでにS/4HANAをご利用中のお客様についてはEarly Watch AlertまたはSAP Readiness Check for S/4HANA upgradesを、現在ECC6.0をご利用中で、S/4HANA移行を予定されているお客様はSAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA conversionを実行いただきます。

  • Early Watch Alertの概要ページ
    • https://support.sap.com/ja/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/early-watch-alert.html
  • SAP for Me - Early Watch Alert Workspace
    • https://me.sap.com/app/ewaworkspace
  • 3404904 - Getting Started on SAP Readiness Check
    • https://me.sap.com/notes/3404904
  • SAP for Me - Readiness Checkランディングページ
    • https://me.sap.com/readinesscheck

2) （Early Watch Alertを実行した場合）Early Watch Alertの結果レポートをSAP EarlyWatch Alert Solution Finderのタイルから実行するか、レポートとしてダウンロードの上、「Compatibility Package Usage - Expiry 31.12.2025」と表示されているアラートの有無を確認します。この時、HCM関連機能が含まれているか確認します。

図1：SAP EarlyWatch Alert Solution Finder画面にて絞り込みを行った場合の例

 

図2：Early Watch Alertの結果レポートのCompatibility Package Usageの例

 

（Readiness Checkを実行した場合）Readiness Checkの結果にてSimplification ItemsやCompatibility Scope Analysisのタイルをクリックし、Human Resourcesの項目でシンプル化（Simplification）の対象があるか、あるいはコンパチビリティ・パックの対象があるか確認します。それぞれの項目についてタイトルやBusiness Impactをクリックいただくと、詳細情報や関連ノートが表示されます。

図3：Readiness Checkツール実行結果例

 

図4：Simplification Itemsの詳細画面の例。Human Resourcesで絞り込みを行うと該当する項目が表示されます。

 

図5：Compatibility Scope Analysisの詳細画面の例。Human Resourcesで絞り込みを行うと該当する項目が表示されます。

3) 2)により、Compatibility Scope AnalysisにてHuman Resourcesの項目がいくつか表示された場合、その機能が現在つかわれているか、また、今後継続して利用するかどうかのご判断をいただきます。

a. 該当機能を現在使われていない、また、今後利用する予定もない場合

特に何もしていただく必要はありません。

b. 該当機能を現在使っているが、今後利用を廃止していく予定である場合

順次、Compatibility Scope Analysisにて抽出された該当機能の利用を停止してください。

c. 該当機能を現在使っていて今後も利用予定である場合、あるいは該当機能を現在使っていないが今後利用予定がある場合

i. HCM機能（人事管理、給与管理、勤怠管理等）をご利用予定のお客様

SAP HCM for S/4HANAのご契約がない場合は、担当のSAP営業、導入・保守パートナーにご連絡ください。SAP HCM for S/4HANAのご契約がある場合、4)以降の手順に進んでください。

ii. HCM機能は利用せず、会計管理や販売管理等他モジュールからの利用用途でミニマスタのみ利用予定だが、Compatibility Scope Analysisに表示された場合

導入・保守パートナーにご連絡の上、詳細な利用範囲の特定と、コンパチビリティ・パックに該当しないご利用方法をご検討ください。

4) HCM機能を継続してご利用いただく場合、SAP HCM for S/4HANAの機能を有効化していただく必要があります。なお、SAP HCM for S/4HANAの機能を有効化すると、2)により抽出されたシンプル化対象項目（Simplification Item）のHuman Resources機能はご利用できなくなります。導入パートナー・保守パートナーにご相談の上、シンプル化の対象項目の代替方法についてご検討ください。

5) シンプル化対象項目の代替方法の検討が進みましたら、ビジネスファンクションスイッチH4S4_1を有効化していただきます。

図6：ビジネスファンクションスイッチH4S4_1

 

  • ビジネスファンクションスイッチH4S4_1については以下のサイトをご確認ください。
    • https://me.sap.com/notes/3200799
    • https://me.sap.com/notes/3443536
    • 3200799 - Business Function for SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA
    • 3443536 - SAP S/4HANA Release 2025 will be delivered with active H4S4_1 Business Function

6) ビジネスファンクションスイッチH4S4_1有効化後、ご利用いただいているHCM機能、HCM以外の機能に影響がないか検証の上、引き続きご利用ください。

 

※注意事項※

  • SAPとして人事ソリューションとしてはSAP SuccessFactorsを主力製品として位置付けています。今後も人事イノベーション領域の拡張はSAP SuccessFactorsに対して行われます。一方で、近い将来SAP SuccessFactorsの移行を望まれないお客様については、引き続きSAP HCM for S/4HANAを通じてHCM機能の継続性、および投資保護が提供されます。
  • 2026年1月1日以降、SAP S/4HANAにてHCM機能をご利用いただく場合、必ず、SAP HCM for S/4HANAをご契約の上、ビジネスファンクションスイッチH4S4_1を有効化する必要があります。
  • S/4HANA2025以降はビジネスファンクションスイッチH4S4_1がデフォルトで有効化されます。S/4HANA2025以降にアップグレードする場合は、必ず事前にシンプル化対象の項目をご確認ください。
